name: Kentucky Kernels- S.a. Express News - Karen
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter by hand using a fork or spoon.
2. Alternately blend in powdered sugar and bourbon by hand using a fork or spoon. Do not use a mixer.
3. Fold in the chopped pecans.
4. Drop 2/3 teaspoonfuls of dough onto wax paper-lined cookie sheets.
5. Cover with wax paper.
6. Refrigerate until set.
7. Store covered in the refrigerator.
